heading: Inside You
info: The brain and heart obey the same laws as lakes.
text: The same equation that describes a dying lake also describes whether a human brain is about to experience a seizure or a heart attack.

heading: Internal Flickers
info: Rising EEG variance detected hours before seizures.
text: EEG signals show rising variance and slowing autocorrelation in the minutes and hours before a major epileptic episode.

heading: CSD in Mood
info: Mood fluctuations increase before a systemic shift.
text: Research shows that mood variance increases before deep depressive episodes. The psychological system 'flickers' between states before tipping.

heading: Personal Resilience
info: Using math to listen to internal warning signs.
text: Your biology is generous enough to warn you. We are building the tools to listen to these internal flickers before they become a collapse.
